description_long: This lamp features a wooden base cut in an irregular, natural slab shape, giving it a rustic and handcrafted appearance. The central stem is turned wood, supporting a square, tapered lampshade decorated with vintage-style airplane illustrations on each face. The lampshade appears to be made of a light-colored fabric or paper, bordered with stitched or painted trim. A visible power cord extends from the base, indicating it is electrically powered. The lamp's overall design combines playful, nostalgic motifs with a sturdy, organic base, making it suitable for eclectic or themed urban interiors. The object is compact and likely intended for placement on a table or desk.
description: A rustic wooden table lamp with a natural slab base and a square shade featuring vintage airplane illustrations. The lamp combines playful decor with a sturdy, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lamp's wooden base, central stem, and the airplane illustration on the lampshade's front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness and irregular edge of the wooden base, as well as the side airplane motif on the shade.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the lampshade and the power cord extending from the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals another airplane illustration and the natural wood grain of the base.
